Dear Candace Baldwin,

Thank you for applying to Samuel Merritt University's Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BSN) program. The applicant pool was highly competitive and after much consideration, we regret to inform you that you have not been selected for admission at this time.

Admission to the BSN program is based upon evaluation of a number of factors such as:
   •	Prerequisite/science grade point average
   •	Completion of prerequisite courses
   •	Letters of reference
   •	Short Answer Responses
   •	Leadership skills
   •	Other factors that the deem pertinent to successful completion of the program and becoming a nurse

Again, thank you for considering Samuel Merritt University. We wish you great success in your educational endeavors.

Sincerely,
Office of Admission
Samuel Merritt University
